title: SAMSUNG The Frame (2025) 43" QLED 4K Art Mode Smart AI TV with Slim Fit Wall Mount - QE43LS03FA

crossSellProducts.title: SAMSUNG HW-S61D/XU 5.0 All-in-One Sound Bar with Dolby Atmos, DTS Virtual:X & Amazon Alexa - White

description.main: The Frame TV from Samsung is no ordinary TV. It'll blend into your home just like a picture frame thanks to its swappable bezel frame (each sold separately). When it's not movie time, Art Mode transforms the screen into a picture gallery. You'll be spoilt for choice with over 3,000 pieces in the Art Store – pick out your favourites and change the feel of your room in an instant. The Matte Display absorbs reflections, so there won't be any distracting glare, even in a bright room. You'll love how good your entertainment looks too. Quantum Dots transform light into lifelike, accurate colour for natural looking scenes. The sky is brighter, the grass is greener, and the details are clearer. It's even been given the thumbs up by Pantone (and they know a thing or two about colour).
goodToKnow: Dolby Atmos uses the TV's speakers to create an immersive surround sound effect – you'll love how incredible everything sounds
Clear the clutter by plugging in your consoles and boxes into the One Connect box – it connects with a single cable to your TV
The NQ4 AI Gen2 Processor is working behind the scenes to boost the brightness, colour, resolution and sound
You'll be able to mount it flush to your wall with the included Slim Fit Wall Mount – just like a real piece of art
Adaptive sensors automatically switches the TV to show art when you walk in the room and back to standby when you leave, helping you save energy
Sports, classic movies, and even the nightly news will get an upgrade to stunning 4K thanks to AI Upscaling Pro
